methodology.combat_render: Synthetic 30x30 road grid. The combat renderer was called 60 times with 220, 500, and 720 visible enemies. Canvas API operation counts are deterministic test-environment proxies, not device FPS.
methodology.ui_snapshot: Synthetic 45x45 road grid with 2025 nodes and 3960 edges. Forty periodic UI snapshots were measured in seven rounds after warming the cached graph; values are median wall-clock times in the test container.
methodology.dense_simulation: Synthetic 31x31 road grid with eight active enemy bases and a 720-enemy population. Five minutes were advanced in 0.25-second steps to validate bounded state at the maximum tier.
